description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Submit a consultation request for a full estate liquidation of a 3-bedroom home in ZIP 30309, choosing the earliest available weekday at least 7 days from today at 10:00 AM, mentioning there are over 100 household items and using the provided contact email.

tasks.instruction: Find an estate sale within 15 miles of ZIP 75001 happening between April 10 and April 20 of the current year that has a Saturday sale day, then on that sale’s page filter to furniture priced between $20 and $80, favorite the first three items shown, and open your favorites list.

target_names: Addison Creekside Estate Sale - Mid-Century & More

tasks.instruction: Use the proceeds calculator to estimate sale proceeds for a 4-bedroom, 2,000 sq ft home in ZIP 80202 with $25,000 in sellable items, including post-sale cleanout and donation pickup and a target sale date in mid-June of the current year, then email the estimate to the provided address.

tasks.instruction: From the FAQ, open the answer that explains whether there is a minimum estate value or size, then use the linked contact form to send a message under the eligibility/minimum size topic asking about an estate valued at $35,000 and include the provided name and email.

tasks.instruction: From the global marketplace, search for vintage items under $150 with customer ratings of at least 4 stars, add two such items from two different estate sales to your cart, and in the cart select the Pay at Pickup payment option if available.
